message:
chore(audit): record batch 406 (fault.rs, sharded_state.rs)

Deep-dive random exploration audit:
- src/channel/fault.rs (1248L): SOUND — fault-injecting channel with
  RAII guards for message preservation across error/cancel paths
- src/runtime/sharded_state.rs (1416L): SOUND — core sharded lock
  ordering infrastructure (E→D→B→A→C), ShardGuard variants
